title: Subapps return a 401 page on denied access and a 404 only when not installed
description: Subapp access control now distinguishes three outcomes. An app that is not installed (or an unknown URL) returns 404. An installed app the visitor cannot access returns the new 401 "Unauthorized" page for authenticated users and redirects guests to the login page. Accessible apps render as before. This replaces the previous behaviour where authenticated users without access and guests on an unavailable subapp both saw a 404. The decision is centralized in a shared classifier reused across all subapps (shop, forum, orders, quotations, events, news, resources, invoices, directory, ticketing), and the 401 page mirrors the existing 404 page.
